name: UMC Fab 12i
umc_relevance: Regional manufacturing anchor for 22/28nm and specialty technology expansion.
relevance_to_umc: Direct anchor for UMC Southeast Asia strategy, Fab 12i synergy, customer assurance, and specialty-node manufacturing credibility.

name: Singapore semiconductor ecosystem
value_chain_position: wafer fab, equipment, logistics, and engineering ecosystem
umc_relevance: Supports using Singapore as the low-risk regional manufacturing and customer assurance hub around Fab 12i.
relevance_to_umc: High-quality ecosystem and institutional support strengthen UMC Fab 12i synergy and regional control-tower logic.

name: Micron Fab 10B Singapore
value_chain_position: memory wafer fabrication and utility-demand signal
umc_relevance: Reinforces Singapore as a major wafer manufacturing hub while highlighting infrastructure competition.
relevance_to_umc: Relevant to UMC because large fab projects may increase competition for power, water, land, and industrial infrastructure around Singapore manufacturing expansion.

name: Micron Singapore HBM assembly plan
umc_relevance: Shows Singapore's advanced packaging adjacency but likely at premium cost.
relevance_to_umc: Adds evidence for Singapore as an advanced packaging adjacency market, though UMC should compare cost against Malaysia and Vietnam options.

name: GlobalFoundries / AMF silicon photonics ecosystem
umc_relevance: Specialty foundry and connectivity adjacency relevant to UMC's specialty and connectivity customer base.
relevance_to_umc: Supports Singapore scoring for connectivity-related customer coverage and specialty technology ecosystem depth.

name: Penang OSAT and packaging cluster
value_chain_position: OSAT, packaging, testing, and supplier ecosystem
umc_relevance: Potential partner base for advanced packaging, testing, and customer engineering support.
relevance_to_umc: Strongest non-Singapore partner ecosystem for UMC advanced packaging and back-end adjacency.

name: Penang chip design and engineering talent pipeline
value_chain_position: IC design, design services, and talent development
umc_relevance: Supports customer engineering, design services, and technical support near OSAT and packaging clusters.
relevance_to_umc: Improves Malaysia's fit for FAE support, customer engineering support, and packaging-related customer qualification.

name: Kulim power semiconductor cluster
umc_relevance: Relevant to UMC specialty, power, automotive, and industrial customer adjacency.
relevance_to_umc: Supports Malaysia's specialty, power, industrial, and automotive semiconductor relevance for UMC's mature-node customer base.

name: Singapore and Malaysia semiconductor equipment routing nodes
umc_relevance: Supports ecosystem adjacency but raises export-control and compliance considerations.
relevance_to_umc: Useful for assessing equipment availability, automation ecosystem depth, and compliance risk in Singapore and Malaysia.

name: Bac Ninh SiP and assembly cluster
umc_relevance: Emerging advanced assembly and test option for future back-end partnership monitoring.
relevance_to_umc: Supports Vietnam as an emerging back-end option and customer support adjacency market.

name: Vietnam electronics and EMS growth cluster
location: Bac Ninh, Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City
umc_relevance: Supports sales office and technical support hub logic for customers using Vietnam as a manufacturing base.
relevance_to_umc: Low-confidence placeholder until official 2025 source is replaced.

name: Philippines assembly, test, and technical support base
value_chain_position: technical support, assembly, test, account operations
umc_relevance: Potential FAE support, account operations, documentation, and customer engineering hub.
relevance_to_umc: Supports Philippines as a technical support and customer operations hub rather than front-end foundry market.

name: Thailand automotive and industrial electronics base
value_chain_position: automotive, industrial electronics, and downstream demand
umc_relevance: Customer coverage opportunity for mature-node automotive, industrial, connectivity, and power devices.
relevance_to_umc: Low-confidence placeholder pending source-specific BOI or EEC verification.

name: Thailand PCB and electronics supply-chain adjacency
location: Eastern Economic Corridor and central Thailand industrial zones
value_chain_position: downstream electronics, PCB, and EMS adjacency
umc_relevance: Potentially relevant to downstream demand and customer engineering support.
relevance_to_umc: Low-confidence placeholder until official electronics / PCB investment references are verified.

name: Indonesia electronics, automotive, and EV demand option
location: Jakarta, Batam, West Java, Central Java
value_chain_position: long-term customer demand, EMS, and logistics option
umc_relevance: Supports market-development and sales coverage logic for long-term automotive, consumer, industrial, and EV-related demand.
relevance_to_umc: Low-confidence placeholder; does not support near-term semiconductor manufacturing without better verified evidence.
